config.open-menu-key.name: Open Menu Key
config.open-menu-key.tooltip: Keybind to open the Date Change menu.
config.apply-immediately.name: Apply Immediately
config.apply-immediately.tooltip: If enabled, Apply happens right now. If disabled (default), Apply queues changes for the next morning.
config.debug-logging.name: Debug Logging
config.debug-logging.tooltip: Show routine Date Change diagnostic messages in the SMAPI console.
